notes: Often used in plural. Commonly followed by 'auf + Akkusativ' to indicate what is affected.

sentences.german: Die Auswirkungen des Klimawandels sind überall zu spüren.
sentences.english: The effects of climate change can be felt everywhere.

sentences.german: Diese Entscheidung hat große Auswirkungen auf unser Leben.
sentences.english: This decision has a major impact on our lives.
